name: Midnight Cake
recipeInstructions:
Heavy cream - 1 cup
Dutch-process cocoa - 1/4 cup
Powdered sugar - 1/4 cup
1. Line the bottoms of two 8-inch square cake pans with wax paper.
2. In a large bowl, thoroughly stir together flour, baking soda, and cocoa.
3. In another bowl, beat eggs until foamy; gradually beat in sugar until thick and ivory-colored.
4. To the flour mixture, add oil, buttermilk, and vanilla; beat until smooth.
5. Blend in egg mixture until batter is thin.
6. Turn batter into prepared pans.
7. Bake in a preheated 350 degree F oven until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean - 35 to 40 minutes.
8. Loosen edges with a small metal spatula; turn out onto wire racks. Cool completely.
9. Put layers together and spread with half cup raspberry jam.
10. Beat together heavy cream, cocoa, and powdered sugar until thick.
11. Frost top and sides of cake.
